revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Joseon | shortname alias = Korea | flag alias = Flag of Korea (1893).svg | flag alias-dynasty = Flag of the king of Joseon.svg | flag alias-royal = Flag of the King of Korea (1882–1907).svg | flag alias-suja = Joseon Sujagi-01.svg | flag alias-1856 = Flag of Joseon (1856).png | flag alias-1876 = Flag of the King of Joseon (1876).png | flag alias-1882 = Flag of Korea (1882-1910).svg | flag alias-188211 = Flag of Korea (November 1882).svg | flag alias-1883 = Flag of Korea (1883).svg | flag alias-1884 = Flag of Korea (1884).svg | flag alias-1888 = Flag of Korea (1888, Denny Taegukgi).svg | flag alias-naval = Ensign of the Joseon Navy.svg | flag alias-navy = Ensign of the Joseon Navy.svg | link alias-navy = Joseon Navy | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = dynasty | var2 = royal | var3 = suja | var4 = 1856 | var5 = 1876 | var6 = 1882 | var7 = 188211 | var8 = 1883 | var9 = 1884 | var10 = 1888 | related1 = First Republic of Korea | related2 = Second Republic of Korea | related3 = Supreme Council for National Reconstruction | related4 = Third Republic of Korea | related5 = Fourth Republic of Korea | related6 = Fifth Republic of Korea | related7 = Korean Empire | related8 = North Korea | related9 = South Korea | related10 = Korea | related11 = Korea under Japanese rule </noinclude> }}

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect <noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude> [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Joseon here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
